mapper.select: SELECT A.US_ID AS usId, A.USER_ID AS userId, A.SKILL_ID AS skillId, B.SKILL_NAME AS skillName, A.USER_LEVEL AS userLevel FROM USER_SKILL A INNER JOIN SKILL B ON A.SKILL_ID = B.SKILL_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_SKILL (US_ID, USER_ID, SKILL_ID, USER_LEVEL) VALUES ( ( SELECT TO_CHAR(NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(US_ID)), 0) + 1) FROM USER_SKILL WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(US_ID, '^[0-9]+$') ), #{userId}, #{skillId}, #{userLevel} )
mapper.select: SELECT ui.ING_ID AS ingId, ui.USER_ID AS userId, ui.TARGET_TYPE AS targetType, ui.TARGET_ID AS targetId, ui.STATUS AS status, ui.LAST_AUTH_DATE AS lastAuthDate, CASE WHEN ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' THEN c.CERTI_NAME WHEN ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CONTEST' THEN ct.CONT_NAME END AS targetName, CASE WHEN ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' THEN TO_CHAR(es.EXAM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHEN ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CONTEST' THEN TO_CHAR(ct.DEADLINE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS examDate FROM USER_ING ui LEFT JOIN CERTIFICATION c ON ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' AND ui.TARGET_ID = c.CERTI_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CERT_ID, MIN(EXAM_DATE) as EXAM_DATE FROM EXAM_SCHEDULE WHERE EXAM_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY CERT_ID ) es ON ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' AND TRIM(REPLACE(c.CERTI_NAME, ' ', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(es.CERT_ID, ' ', '')) LEFT JOIN CONTEST ct ON ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CONTEST' AND ui.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(ct.CONT_ID) WHERE ui.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ui.ING_ID DESC

SELECT S.SAVED_ID as savedId, S.USER_ID as userId, S.TARGET_TYPE as targetType, S.TARGET_ID as targetId, NVL(C.CERTI_NAME, T.CONT_NAME) as targetName FROM SAVED_ITEM S LEFT OUTER JOIN CERTIFICATION C ON S.TARGET_ID = C.CERTI_ID AND S.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' LEFT OUTER JOIN CONTEST T ON S.TARGET_ID = T.CONT_ID AND S.TARGET_TYPE = 'CONTEST' WHERE S.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT SKILL_ID as SKILL_ID, SKILL_NAME as SKILL_NAME FROM SKILL ORDER BY SKILL_NAME ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM USER_ING WHERE ING_ID = #{ingId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT examName, dayLeft, examDate, targetType, targetId FROM ( SELECT examName, dayLeft, examDate, targetType, targetId, sortDate FROM ( SELECT c.CERTI_NAME AS examName, TRUNC(es.EXAM_DATE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS dayLeft, es.EXAM_DATE AS examDate, ui.TARGET_TYPE AS targetType, ui.TARGET_ID AS targetId, es.EXAM_DATE AS sortDate FROM USER_ING ui JOIN CERTIFICATION c ON ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' AND ui.TARGET_ID = c.CERTI_ID JOIN EXAM_SCHEDULE es ON TRIM(REPLACE(c.CERTI_NAME, ' ', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(es.CERT_ID, ' ', '')) WHERE ui.USER_ID = #{userId} AND es.EXAM_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) UNION ALL SELECT ct.CONT_NAME AS examName, TRUNC(ct.DEADLINE) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS dayLeft, ct.DEADLINE AS examDate, ui.TARGET_TYPE AS targetType, ui.TARGET_ID AS targetId, ct.DEADLINE AS sortDate FROM USER_ING ui JOIN CONTEST ct ON ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CONTEST' AND ui.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(ct.CONT_ID) WHERE ui.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ct.DEADLINE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) ORDER BY sortDate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SAVED_ITEM WHERE USER_ID = #{param1} AND TARGET_ID = #{param2} AND TARGET_TYPE = #{param3}
mapper.select: SELECT uj.JOB_ID AS jobId, jr.JOB_NAME AS jobName FROM USER_JOB uj JOIN JOB_ROLE jr ON uj.JOB_ID = jr.JOB_ID WHERE uj.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.SKILL_ID AS skillId, s.SKILL_NAME AS skillName, jcsw.WEIGHT AS weight FROM JOB_CATEGORY_SKILL_WEIGHT jcsw JOIN SKILL s ON jcsw.SKILL_ID = s.SKILL_ID WHERE jcsw.JOB_CATEGORY = #{jobCategory} ORDER BY jcsw.WEIGHT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT ui.ING_ID AS ingId, ui.STATUS AS status, CASE WHEN ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' THEN TO_CHAR(es.EXAM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHEN ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CONTEST' THEN TO_CHAR(ct.DEADLINE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS examDate FROM USER_ING ui LEFT JOIN CERTIFICATION c ON ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' AND ui.TARGET_ID = c.CERTI_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CERT_ID, MIN(EXAM_DATE) as EXAM_DATE FROM EXAM_SCHEDULE WHERE EXAM_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY CERT_ID ) es ON TRIM(REPLACE(c.CERTI_NAME, ' ', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(es.CERT_ID, ' ', '')) LEFT JOIN CONTEST ct ON ui.TARGET_TYPE = 'CONTEST' AND ui.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(ct.CONT_ID) WHERE ui.ING_ID = #{ingId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_ING SET STATUS = #{status}, LAST_AUTH_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE ING_ID = #{ingId}
